title: Penalties
doc_html:
§903.  Penalties

Any person violating the provisions of R.S. 23:900-23:904 shall be fined not more than one thousand ($1,000.00) dollars or be imprisoned for not more than one year, or both, at the discretion of the court.

Acts 1962, No. 365, §5.
